Left longest: 8
Right longest: 8

Left winner: I lost, C none, AND win, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none
Right winner: I none, C none, AND win, OR none, XOR none, AND-NOT none, OR-NOT none

Longest Left: AND 71-0 02-1 13-2 24-3 35-4 46-5 57-6 60-7 complete
Longest Right: AND 60-7 57-6 46-5 35-4 24-3 13-2 02-1 71-0 complete

8 + 8 = 16 > 8
Right will be truncated to length 8 - 8 = 0

Truncated left: AND 71-0 02-1 13-2 24-3 35-4 46-5 57-6 60-7 complete

0 AND 71

Matched
0 AND 71
1 AND 02
2 AND 13
3 AND 24
4 AND 35
5 AND 46
6 AND 57
7 AND 60

Applying to 11111000
Input
I 0 = 1
I 1 = 1
I 2 = 1
I 3 = 1
I 4 = 1
I 5 = 0
I 6 = 0
I 7 = 0
Output
0 AND 71 = AND(I 7,I 1) = AND(0,1) = 0
1 AND 02 = AND(I 0,I 2) = AND(1,1) = 1
2 AND 13 = AND(I 1,I 3) = AND(1,1) = 1
3 AND 24 = AND(I 2,I 4) = AND(1,1) = 1
4 AND 35 = AND(I 3,I 5) = AND(1,0) = 0
5 AND 46 = AND(I 4,I 6) = AND(1,0) = 0
6 AND 57 = AND(I 5,I 7) = AND(0,0) = 0
7 AND 60 = AND(I 6,I 0) = AND(0,1) = 0

\boxed{01110000}
